description_long: This dishwasher features a sleek, modern design with a matte black finish and a flat, rectangular front panel. The control panel is located at the top of the front face, containing a digital display and several touch-sensitive buttons, all clearly labeled with icons and text. The door handle is integrated just below the control panel, forming a horizontal silver accent that contrasts with the dark exterior. The sides and top of the dishwasher are smooth and unadorned, with gently rounded edges that soften its boxy silhouette. The appliance appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely stainless steel, with some plastic components for the control interface and handle. Its overall appearance is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, matte black dishwasher with a flat front panel, integrated handle, and a digital control panel at the top. The design is sleek, minimalist, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat black panel, integrated silver handle, and a digital control panel with labeled buttons and display.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, unadorned matte black surface and the slight protrusion of the top control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, featureless matte black surface with rounded edges.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a smooth, unadorned matte black finish and visible top control panel edge.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is a horizontal strip at the top of the front face, featuring a digital display on the right, a series of touch-sensitive buttons grouped together, and clear iconography and text labels for each function.
attribute_door_handle_style: The door handle is a horizontal, integrated bar located just below the control panel, finished in silver, slightly recessed, and seamlessly blending with the front panel.
attribute_visible_buttons_or_dials: Several rectangular touch-sensitive buttons are visible on the control panel, grouped to the right side, with white icons and text labels. No physical dials or switches are present.
attribute_front_panel_design: The front panel is flat, matte black, and untextured, with a single silver handle accent and a black control panel at the top. It is minimalist, with no decorative seams, windows, or additional features.
